message:
chore: bump workspace version 0.1.0 → 0.1.1

Increment version across all three workspace crates (root asupersync,
asupersync-macros, asupersync-conformance) to 0.1.1 and add explicit
path references for intra-workspace dependencies so cargo resolves
them locally during development rather than pulling from the registry.

- asupersync: 0.1.0 → 0.1.1, add path = "asupersync-macros" and
  path = "conformance" to optional and dev dependency entries
- asupersync-macros: 0.1.0 → 0.1.1
- asupersync-conformance: 0.1.0 → 0.1.1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "asupersync-macros"
-version = "0.1.0"
+version = "0.1.1"
 edition = "2021"
 license = "MIT"
 description = "Proc macros for asupersync structured concurrency runtime"

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "asupersync-conformance"
-version = "0.1.0"
+version = "0.1.1"
 edition = "2021"
 description = "Conformance test suite for async runtime specifications"
 license = "MIT"
